name: stackra/application
purpose: Application (product-catalogue) module — global cross-tenant Application registry + BusinessType dual-source catalogue (code-primary via enum, DB mirror for tenant customs).
capabilities: Application aggregate (app_...) — one per Stackra product
BelongsToApplication trait for downstream tenant-scoped rows
when_to_use: Every identity-service module that scopes rows by application_id depends on the aggregate registered here.
when_not_to_use: For the per-Application customer record, use the sibling stackra/tenancy package instead.
